  • Authentic Oil

Welcome to Authentic Oil, a passionate purveyor of exceptional cooking oils sourced from the heart of the Mediterranean and beyond. We are a small but dedicated team driven by a shared love for culinary adventures and a belief in the transformative power of high-quality ingredients. Join us on a culinary journey like no other.

About Authentic Oil

Authentic Oil is a new and exciting venture dedicated to bringing the finest extra virgin olive oils and specialty cooking oils to food enthusiasts across the region. Founded in 2024 and based in Europe, we are a passionate team currently in the exciting phase of market research and development. Join us on this flavorful adventure as we bring the magic of the Mediterranean to your kitchen.

Our Mission

Our mission is driven by a belief in the transformative power of quality cooking oil. It's not just a kitchen staple, but an essential ingredient that can elevate any dish. That's why we are committed to partnering with small-scale, local producers who share our values of tradition, quality, and sustainability. By working closely with these artisans, we aim to showcase the unique flavors and aromas of each region, providing a truly authentic culinary experience.

Our Strengths

Curated Selection

We meticulously curate our collection, choosing only the finest oils that meet our strict standards for taste, aroma, and quality.

Small-Batch Producers

We forge strong relationships with small- batch producers, ensuring the oils' authenticity and supporting traditional craftsmanship.

Regional Diversity

Our oils showcase the unique characteristics of their regions, allowing our customers to explore a variety of flavors and aromas.

Reliable Sourcing

With our expertise and connections, we provide a reliable source of high-quality cooking oils, ensuring consistent availability and fresh products.



Health Conscious

We prioritize health and wellness, offering oils with high nutritional value and beneficial properties, ensuring that every meal is not just delicious but also nourishing.

Sustainability

We are committed to sustainable practices and fostering long-term relationships with our producers. We strive to minimize our environmental impact and ensure fair and transparent partnerships.

What We're Working On

Market Research

We are dedicated to understanding the needs and preferences of our potential customers, so we are currently conducting thorough market research to guide our product development and sourcing.

Sourcing and Partnerships

Our team is actively building relationships with small-scale, local producers across the Mediterranean who share our commitment to quality and authenticity.

Product Development

We are carefully curating a diverse range of cooking oils, ensuring they meet our high standards for taste, aroma, and health benefits.

Brand Building

As a young company, we are focused on establishing a strong brand identity that reflects our values and connects with our target audience.

How You Can Get Involved

Investor Opportunities

We are grateful for your interest in Authentic Oil. As we are in the early stages, we are actively seeking investors who share our vision and passion for bringing authentic cooking oils to the market. Contact us to discuss potential investment opportunities and be a part of our journey from the beginning.

Feedback and Collaboration

Your feedback is invaluable to us. If you are a potential customer, chef, or industry expert, we would love to hear your thoughts on our product ideas and how we can improve. Get in touch to share your insights and help shape the future of Authentic Oil.

Our Oil Collection

  • Extra Virgin Olive Oils
  • Specialty Oils
  • Infused Oils

Limited Edition Oils

Keep an eye out for our limited-edition oils, where we showcase rare and unique varieties sourced from small-batch producers. These special releases will take you on a journey to discover extraordinary flavors from remote regions, offering you a chance to explore the truly exceptional.

Contact Me

Get in Touch with Authentic Oil

We'd love to hear from you! Whether you're a food enthusiast, a potential partner, or just curious to learn more, drop us a message, and one of our team members will get back to you shortly.
